nasb.text: “Before she travailed, she brought forth; Before her pain came, she gave birth to a boy.

esv.text: “Before she was in labor she gave birth; before her pain came upon her she delivered a son.

cnv.text: 錫安沒有絞痛就生產； 疼痛沒有臨到她身上，就生了一個男孩。

ccb.text: “锡安还没有阵痛就分娩， 还没有感到产痛就生下男婴。

csbs.text: 锡安没有产痛就生产， 阵痛还没有临到，她就生下一个男孩。
